reviews.comment:
Los surtidores espectaculares los que te atienden. En el full, el que me atendió tenia todos los problemas, no a pagar con la app, no al qr porque no se que problema, le pago con tarjeta y no me hace el descuento de socio del ACA, si no tenes ganas QUEDATE EN CASA.

(Translated by Google)
The pumps are spectacular, the service is amazing. At Full, the person who helped me had all the problems: not paying with the app, not using QR codes, because I don't know what the problem is. I pay with a card, and they won't give me the ACA member discount. If you don't want to, STAY HOME.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpNDh6Q21RRRAB
